ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Source of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON or text data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
